input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.11 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.11
            TITLE: autocross event

            CONTENT:
            rule D.11: AUTOCROSS EVENT
D.11 AUTOCROSS EVENT 
The Autocross event evaluates the vehicle maneuverability and handling qualities on a tight 
course

final_answer: rule D.11: AUTOCROSS EVENT The Autocross event evaluates the vehicle maneuverability and handling qualities on a tight course
